mapper.select: SELECT id, file_identifier as fileIdentifier, file_size as fileSize, file_path as filePath FROM sys_file WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, file_identifier as fileIdentifier, file_size as fileSize, file_path as filePath FROM sys_file WHERE file_identifier = #{identifier} LIMIT 1

SELECT CONCAT('f_', uf.id) as id, uf.file_name as name, uf.is_dir as isDir, uf.parent_id as parentId, uf.update_time as updateTime, f.file_size as size, CASE WHEN uf.is_dir = '1' THEN 'folder' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.jpg' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.png' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.jpeg' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.gif' THEN 'image' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.mp4' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.avi' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.mov' THEN 'video' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.pdf' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.doc%' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.xls%' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.ppt%' THEN 'doc' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.mp3' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.wav' THEN 'audio' ELSE 'other' END as type FROM sys_user_file uf LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON uf.file_id = f.id
AND uf.user_id = #{userId}
AND uf.is_deleted = 0
AND (uf.file_name LIKE '%.jpg' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.png' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.jpeg' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.gif')
AND (uf.file_name LIKE '%.mp4' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.avi' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.mov')
AND (uf.file_name LIKE '%.pdf' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.doc%' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.xls%' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.ppt%')
AND (uf.file_name LIKE '%.mp3' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.wav')
AND uf.is_dir = '0' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.jpg' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.png' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.jpeg' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.gif' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.mp4' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.avi' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.mov' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.pdf' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.doc%' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.xls%' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.ppt%' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.mp3' AND uf.file_name NOT LIKE '%.wav'
AND uf.parent_id = #{parentId}
AND uf.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
ORDER BY uf.is_dir DESC, uf.update_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id as userId, file_id as fileId, parent_id as parentId, file_name as fileName, is_dir as isDir FROM sys_user_file WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file (file_identifier, file_size, file_path, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{fileIdentifier}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO sys_user_file (user_id, file_id, parent_id, file_name, is_dir, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fileId}, #{parentId}, #{fileName}, #{isDir}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('f_', uf.id) as id, uf.file_name as name, CASE WHEN uf.is_dir = '1' THEN 'folder' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.zip' THEN 'zip' WHEN uf.file_name LIKE '%.jpg' OR uf.file_name LIKE '%.png' THEN 'image' ELSE 'other' END as type, f.file_size as size, DATE_FORMAT(uf.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as deleteTime, -- 核心逻辑：30减去已被删除的天数。如果在回收站待了超过30天，会出现负数，前端可标记为“即将自动清理” GREATEST(0, 30 - DATEDIFF(NOW(), uf.update_time)) as daysLeft FROM sys_user_file uf LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON uf.file_id = f.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.is_deleted = 1 AND ( uf.parent_id = 'root' OR uf.parent_id NOT IN ( SELECT CONCAT('f_', id) FROM sys_user_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 ) ) ORDER BY uf.update_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT id FROM sys_user_file WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
